content:
✔ How This Works:
• At the beginning of the semester, each class has one transformative path slot open.
• If no player selects it voluntarily, the transformation infects a randomly chosen player at the midpoint of the course.
• The “infection” is thematically tied to the week’s content.

✔ Example Infection Scenarios:
• The Faustian Bargain – The highest-ranking player is suddenly “offered a deal.”
• Jekyll & Hyde Transformation – A player known for consistency suddenly begins failing key moments.
• The Mark of Lucifer – A faction leader is cursed with a temptation they cannot refuse.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Ensures every class has at least one transformative narrative moment.
✔ Adds an element of surprise and narrative intrigue.
✔ Prevents stagnation—someone will always be affected.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 497 (chunk 497/555)
